title: Artemis' Thin Logs
description: Adds thinner logs that can be combined with carpets and leaves.
body: ![Logo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artemis_Thin_Logs/BH_ATL_header.webp) ![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artemis_Thin_Logs/BH_ATL_overview.webp) Thin Log Variants: Say goodbye to chunky logs! Thin Logs offers slender variants for all wood types in Minecraft. ![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artemis_Thin_Logs/BH_ATL_features.webp) **Enhanced Flooring** Thin Logs goes beyond traditional placements. Just like carpets and snow, you can now use leaves to decorate the Thin Logs. This unique feature allows for seamless integration of leaves, adding a natural touch and further enhancing your building aesthetics. **Crafting Convenience** Crafting Thin Logs is a breeze. Simply convert regular logs into their thin counterparts. Need planks? You can easily transform Thin Logs back into planks using a simple crafting recipe. ![Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artemis_Thin_Logs/BH_ATL_discord.webp) There is also a community Discord.Feel free to join and take part in the "Intelligence" community. Projects of us include for example Advanced Peripherals. [Discord](https://discord.intelligence-modding.de/) ![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artemis_Thin_Logs/BH_ATL_promo.webp) Are you looking for a new and challenging adventure? Dreaming of machines, power plants, magic or even bees? **MyFTB** is the largest German modded Minecraft network. One world is not enough! That's why every player gets their own world with us. Play alone or in a team and get the greatest flexibility and security for maximum gaming fun. With over **20 modpacks**, you're guaranteed to find the right one for you! Check out their [Website](https://myftb.de), [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/myftb) and [Launcher](https://launcher.myftb.de) In the MyFTB launcher, you always have the right modpack versions to play on our servers. In addition, the servers are directly saved!
